recording: unavailable: Browser plugin recording/trace support was not exposed; Chrome CDP was used for rendered screenshots and appshot text without installing dependencies.

scenarios.name: default search
scenarios.expected: Search cards lead with estimated final total and show hourly rate as supporting context, with no discount label for ordinary 24-hour search.
scenarios.observed: Nissan Rogue / Year / 2021 / Class / SUV / Passengers / 5 / Doors / 5 / $1,392 / estimated total / $58/hr/24 hr / Book now

scenarios.name: holiday search
scenarios.expected: June 15 to June 17 includes June 16 strictly inside; search shows Holiday discount and final total $2,310.72 for Nissan Rogue.
scenarios.observed: Nissan Rogue / Year / 2021 / Class / SUV / Passengers / 5 / Doors / 5 / $2,310.72 / estimated total / Holiday discount / $58/hr/48 hr / Save $473.28 / Book now

scenarios.name: holiday review consistency
scenarios.expected: Review for the same Nissan holiday trip shows final Total Cost $2,310.72, subtotal $2,784, and Holiday discount -$473.28.
scenarios.observed: Almost there / Your adventure is about to begin! scenarios.name: long reservation search
scenarios.expected: June 20 to June 24 is >72 hours with no holiday; search shows Long reservation discount and final total $4,608 for Nissan Rogue.
scenarios.observed: Nissan Rogue / Year / 2021 / Class / SUV / Passengers / 5 / Doors / 5 / $4,608 / estimated total / Long reservation discount / $58/hr/96 hr / Save $960 / Book now

scenarios.expected: Review for the same Nissan long trip shows Total Cost $4,608 and Long reservation discount -$960.
